CustomField.description: The label for status. We do not refer to the reduivy__Status__c field here due to formula size restriction.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( TEXT( Status_Override__c ) ), IF( TODAY() > End_Date__c, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Completed, IF( TODAY() >= Start_Date__c, IF( NOW() >= Enrollment_Open_Date_Calculated__c && (ISNULL( Enrollment_Close_Date_Calculated__c) || NOW() <= Enrollment_Close_Date_Calculated__c), $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Running_Enrollment_Opened, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Running ), IF( NOW() > Enrollment_Close_Date_Calculated__c, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Enrollment_Closed, IF( NOW() >= Enrollment_Open_Date_Calculated__c, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Enrollment_Opened, IF( NOT(ISNULL( Pre_enrollment_Open_Date_Calculated__c)) && NOW() >= Pre_enrollment_Open_Date_Calculated__c, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Pre_enrollment_Opened, $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Not_Started ) ) ) ) ), CASE( TEXT( Status_Override__c ), 'Draft', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Draft, 'Not Started', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Not_Started, 'Pre-enrollment Opened', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Pre_enrollment_Opened, 'Enrollment Opened', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Enrollment_Opened, 'Enrollment Closed', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Enrollment_Closed, 'Running (Enrollment Opened)', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Running_Enrollment_Opened, 'Running', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Running, 'Completed', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Completed, 'Cancelled', $Label.reduivy__Offering_Status_Cancelled, '' ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status based on date fields in study session and study offering.
CustomField.label: Status
